text: Welcome, helper_alex! You have been approved as a moderator. Please start by reviewing the community rules, moderation guidelines, and escalation process before taking action. Glad to have you onboard.
Welcome, guide_sam! You have been approved as an event_helper. Please review the event coordination notes, community rules, and where to ask for support before jumping in. Happy to have you here.
Welcome, newbie_kim! You have been approved as a member. Please take a minute to read the community rules and introduction resources, then feel free to jump in and say hello.

Welcome, mentor_lina! You have been approved as a mentor. Please review the mentoring expectations, community rules, and support pathways so you are set before engaging with members. Glad to have you with us.
